deny.name: models-no-runtime-deps
deny.reason: Models/types stay pure — no search engine dependencies

deny.name: models-no-scrape-deps
deny.reason: Models/types stay pure — no scraping dependencies

deny.name: models-no-content-deps
deny.reason: Models/types stay pure — no content resolver dependencies

deny.name: search-no-scrape
deny.reason: Search engines return results — scraping is a separate layer handled by server/content

deny.name: utils-no-business-logic
deny.reason: Utils are leaf nodes — no reverse deps into business logic

deny.name: utils-no-content
deny.reason: Utils are leaf nodes — no reverse deps into content resolvers

deny.name: utils-no-scrape
deny.reason: Utils are leaf nodes — no reverse deps into scraping
